hsk.ai_placeholder: e.g. What's the difference between 你好 and 您好?

practice.question: Question
practice.title: Practice

ai.title: AI Learning
ai.no_ai_tasks: No AI tasks for this lesson.
ai.not_connected_friendly: AI connection is not ready yet. You can still use the guided practice mode.
ai.tutor_subtitle: Practice with AI using this lesson's content.
ai.mode_desc_explain: Explains the key sentences and expressions in this lesson.
ai.mode_desc_roleplay: Practice greetings and self-introduction in a real-life style.
ai.mode_desc_shadowing: Speak each line into the mic; get recognition, a score, and friendly feedback.
ai.shadowing_speaking_lead: Listen to each line, then speak. Tap the mic for quick feedback and a score.
ai.shadowing_speaking_intro: Check the characters, pinyin, and meaning, then tap the mic. Tap again to stop recording.
ai.shadowing_feedback_no_speech: We couldn’t hear you clearly. Please speak a bit louder.
ai.shadowing_feedback_excellent_1: Nice work — clear and close to standard. Ready for the next line?
ai.shadowing_feedback_good_1: Good job. A little clearer and it’ll be even better.
ai.shadowing_feedback_ok_1: You’re getting there — slow down and match the characters once more.
ai.shadowing_feedback_retry_1: That’s okay — one more try usually does the trick.
ai.shadowing_err_insecure_body: Recording needs HTTPS or localhost. Open the page over https or locally.
ai.shadowing_err_no_getusermedia_body: This environment does not support navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia.
ai.shadowing_err_no_mediarecorder_body: MediaRecorder is not supported. Use the latest Chrome or Edge.
ai.shadowing_err_mic_denied_body: Allow microphone access in the browser address bar, then try again.
ai.shadowing_err_no_mic_body: Connect a microphone and try again.
ai.shadowing_err_stt_unsupported_body: This browser does not support Web Speech recognition. Use Chrome or Edge.
ai.shadowing_err_stt_denied_body: Allow speech recognition and try again.
ai.shadowing_err_stt_no_text_body: Audio was saved, but no Chinese was recognized. Speak louder or check the browser speech service.
ai.shadowing_feedback_no_speech_short: No clear speech detected. Check the mic is on and try again closer to the mic.
ai.shadowing_asr_uploading_body: Running official speech evaluation on the server. Please wait.
ai.shadowing_server_mismatch_title: Not close enough to the target
ai.shadowing_server_mismatch_body: The server heard: “{heard}”. Try again and get closer to the target pronunciation.
ai.shadowing_server_empty_body: We received your recording, but the server could not extract valid Chinese text. Please retry or try again later.
ai.shadowing_asr_not_configured_body: The server is not configured for speech recognition yet. Contact the administrator or try again later.
ai.shadowing_server_error_body: The server is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
ai.shadowing_asr_network_body: Could not reach the speech service. Check your network and try again.
ai.shadowing_browser_preview_note: Browser preview (for reference only; not your official score)
ai.shadowing_err_recording_empty_body: Hold the mic longer and speak clearly, then try again.
ai.shadowing_asr_provider_unavailable_body: The server speech service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
ai.shadowing_asr_quota_exceeded_body: Speech recognition usage is temporarily over the limit. Please try again in a moment.
ai.shadowing_asr_no_model_body: Speech recognition could not run right now. Please try again in a moment.
ai.shadowing_card_record_soon: Recording will be available in a future update.
ai.shadowing_no_content: No shadowing content for this lesson. Check that vocabulary and dialogue data are loaded.
ai.mode_desc_free_talk: Ask freely using the words and sentences from today's lesson.
ai.mode_not_ready: This mode is not ready yet.
ai.situation_no_expressions: Review the phrases in this lesson’s dialogue.
ai.situation_teacher_prompt: If I say this, how would you respond?
ai.situation_speech_unsupported: Speech recognition isn’t available in this browser. You can still read the sample answers.
ai.situation_asr_failed: We couldn’t catch that. Tap “Try again” and speak once more.
ai.situation_fb_close: Good try—close in meaning, but this lesson focuses on 「{expected}」 first. (Heard: 「{heard}」)
ai.situation_asr_err_permission: Microphone permission is required. Allow mic access for this site in your browser settings.
ai.situation_asr_err_mic: Couldn’t open the microphone. Check that a mic is connected.
ai.situation_asr_err_no_audio: The input was very quiet. Move closer to the mic and try again.
ai.situation_asr_err_no_hear: We couldn’t hear that clearly. Please speak again, a bit louder.
ai.situation_asr_err_service: Speech recognition is temporarily unavailable. Try again in a moment.
ai.situation_asr_err_recognition: Something went wrong with speech recognition. Tap “Try again”.
ai.situation_asr_mismatch_lead: We heard you, but it doesn’t quite match this lesson’s target line.
ai.situation_goal_fallback: Practice a short exchange using this lesson’s lines.
ai.situation_no_lesson_data: Dialogue data is missing for this lesson.
ai.free_talk_hint: Ask questions about this lesson's content.
ai.free_question_intro: Ask about words, phrases, and dialogue from this lesson—within today's material.
ai.free_question_scope: We focus on meanings, differences, usage, the lesson dialogue, and short examples—centered on this lesson.
ai.free_question_example_1: What's the difference between 「你」 and 「您」?
ai.free_question_example_2: How are 「不客气」 and 「没关系」 different?
ai.free_question_example_4: Can you explain this sentence in simpler words?
ai.free_question_placeholder: e.g. When should I use 「不客气」?
ai.free_talk_loading_step_1: I’m checking what you learned in this lesson first.
ai.free_talk_loading_step_2: I’m organizing the expressions related to your question.
ai.free_talk_loading_step_3: I’ll explain it in a simple and clear way.
ai.free_talk_loading_step_4: Your answer will be ready soon.
ai.free_talk_voice_retry: We couldn’t hear that clearly. Please try again.
ai.free_talk_voice_not_supported: Voice input isn’t supported in this browser.
ai.lesson_qa_fallback_network: We couldn’t reach the tutor right now. Please try again in a moment.
ai.free_talk_answer_hello: "你好" and "您好" are both greetings. "您好" is more polite, while "你好" is more common and casual.
ai.free_talk_answer_ma: "吗" is the question particle for yes-no questions. Add it after a statement to form a question. E.g. 你好吗？
ai.free_talk_answer_generic: Good question. Please try asking within the words and sentences from this lesson.
ai.free_talk_answer_empty: Please enter your question. I'll answer based on this lesson's content.
ai.explain_grammar: The key pattern is "A 是 B". "是" indicates judgment and identity. Use it to describe nationality or identity.
ai.explain_tip: Pay attention to the relationship before and after "是" when reading.
ai.roleplay_task: Now greet your classmate and introduce yourself.
ai.shadowing_heading: Shadowing practice: Follow the order and practice one sentence at a time.
ai.lesson_focus_section_practice_focus: What to practice in this lesson
ai.lesson_focus_quotes_intro: Below are lines from this lesson’s dialogue (pinyin & translation).
ai.lesson_focus_usage_fallback: Use these lines in the right role and situation in this lesson.
ai.lesson_focus_no_core: Study the expressions using the dialogue and practice lines below.
ai.lesson_focus_no_dialogue: Open the Dialogue tab in the textbook and practice with the audio.
ai.lesson_tip_fallback_1: Match politeness to the situation: 您 for elders/teachers; 你 is common among peers or in casual settings.
ai.lesson_tip_fallback_2: Listen for the scene first, then imitate the lesson lines. Avoid phrases you haven’t learned yet.
ai.lesson_focus_use_nin_hao: A polite greeting to teachers and elders.
ai.lesson_focus_use_ni_hao: A common hello among friends and classmates.
ai.lesson_focus_use_duibuqi: Say this to apologize for a mistake or inconvenience.
ai.lesson_focus_use_meiguanxi: A common reply meaning “it’s okay” after an apology.
ai.lesson_focus_use_bukeqi: Often paired as a reply to 谢谢.
ai.lesson_focus_bullet_polite_nin: You greet the teacher with 王老师, then 您好 — 您 is polite “you,” more formal than 你好.
ai.lesson_focus_bullet_casual_ni: The teacher to a student, or classmates, often use 你好 with the everyday pronoun 你.
ai.lesson_focus_bullet_apology_pair: 对不起 starts an apology; 没关系 is a typical reply.
ai.lesson_focus_bullet_thanks_pair: 谢谢 and 不客气 often work together as thanks and reply.
ai.lesson_focus_ability_nin_ni: Choose 您 vs 你 for the right person/situation.
ai.lesson_focus_ability_greet: Use basic greetings for hello and goodbye.
ai.lesson_focus_ability_apology: Apologize simply and reply to an apology.
ai.lesson_focus_ability_apology_thanks: Give simple apologies, thanks, and short replies.
ai.lesson_focus_ability_empty: Follow the objectives and dialogue to master this lesson.
ai.lesson_focus_group_usage_nin_ni: Polite 您 vs everyday 你 — match the addressee.
ai.lesson_focus_group_usage_greeting: 您好 is more formal; 你好 is common among peers.
ai.lesson_focus_group_usage_apology: 对不起 → 没关系 (apology and reply).
ai.lesson_focus_group_usage_thanks: 谢谢 → 不客气 (thanks and reply).
ai.lesson_focus_tip_final_1: 您 = polite “you” (elders, teachers). 你 = everyday “you” (peers).
ai.lesson_focus_tip_final_2: 没关系 answers 对不起; 不客气 answers 谢谢 — don’t swap them.
ai.lesson_focus_tip_fallback_generic_1: Use this lesson’s dialogue to pair questions with answers, and learn words inside sentences.
ai.lesson_focus_tip_fallback_generic_2: When unsure, mimic the textbook lines first, then swap names, numbers, or country names.

home.today_desc: Continue from where you left off!

stroke.title: Stroke Order
stroke.desc: Enter a character to see stroke animation and trace practice.
stroke.meaning_hint: Shows pinyin, meaning, and examples from HSK.
stroke.missing_data: Stroke data not yet available for this character.

kids.title: Kids Chinese
kids.subtitle: Learn Chinese the fun way
kids.book1Desc: 8 lessons · Core Sentences · Dialogue · Extra · Practice · AI Tutor
kids.book1Meta: 8 lessons · Core · Dialogue · Extra · Practice · AI Tutor

kids1.book1Subtitle: 8 lessons · Core Sentence · Dialogue · Extension · Practice · AI Tutor
kids1.practiceHint: Lesson practice coming soon. For picture choice / matching / color click, etc.
kids1.aiTutorHint: Practice this lesson's sentences and words with the AI tutor.
kids1.gameDesc: Game entry placeholder for this lesson. In future, picture choice, matching, and color-click games will appear here.

culture.title: Culture
culture.subtitle: Learn Chinese language and culture together.

tools.subtitle: Extras that pair with the Teacher Workspace; the workspace remains the main hub.

workflow.publish_routing_hint: Use My listings to submit and track reviews. The review console is for platform reviewers only.

publishing_page.title: My listings
publishing_page.subtitle: Submit classroom work for review, then set visibility when it is approved.
publishing_page.note: You are seeing your own rows in this browser’s demo data.
publishing_page.link_full_console: Open full Stage 0 console (advanced demo tools)
publishing_page.session_identity_hint: This page uses your signed-in account. To switch demo users, open the full Stage 0 console.

review_page.title: Platform review workspace
review_page.subtitle: Pick a listing, move its status, and leave a reason when rejecting or delisting (demo data).
review_page.subtitle_reviewer: You are in reviewer mode: handle teacher profiles first, then courseware listings. Reviews are manual at this stage.
review_page.note: Demo only: not a real compliance queue.
review_page.note_reviewer: Human review today; later we may add AI pre-screening or assistive checks—final decisions remain human.
review_page.gate_body: This area is for platform reviewers working on teacher profiles and courseware listings. Teachers should use “My listings” to submit work and check status.
review_page.gate_hint: If you are not a reviewer, use “My listings” below for your own submissions.
review_page.gate_dev_console_lead: Dev / demo: switch to a reviewer or admin demo user from the full Stage 0 console.
review_page.gate_switch_identity: Open full console to switch identity
review_page.reviewer_banner_lead: You can process two areas here: teacher profiles (identity/credentials) and courseware listings (publishable items).
review_page.manual_review_note: Human review: outcomes are recorded by reviewers in the system.
review_page.ai_future_note: Future versions may add AI pre-screening or assistive review to speed up triage and surface risks.

review_tp.section_lead: Separate from “Courseware listing review” below: identity and credentials vs. publishable courseware listings.
review_tp.note_placeholder: Internal note or message to the teacher
review_tp.empty_pending: No teacher profile is waiting for review.
review_tp.listing_block_lead: Courseware listing status and reviewer controls—separate from teacher profile review above.

listing_detail.format_courseware_blurb: For use in the linked lesson’s classroom. Details follow below.
listing_detail.preview_mode_lead: Visible to you only as the teacher.
listing_detail.preview_can_go_public: Approved. You can set this listing to public display.
listing_detail.preview_context_draft: This listing is still a draft. Polish the deck, then submit for review.
listing_detail.preview_context_rejected: This listing was not approved. Check the listing console for details.
listing_detail.preview_context_approved_unlisted: Approved, but not set to public yet.
listing_detail.preview_acquire_note: Purchasing is not simulated in teacher preview. Learners can acquire after you publish.
listing_detail.audience_placeholder: Learners in the linked course path; exact cohorts will be configurable later.
listing_detail.format_placeholder: Lesson flow in this preview; files and slides connect in a later release.
listing_detail.usage_placeholder: Live classroom with the teacher, or preview the flow on your own in this demo.
listing_detail.coming_more: More materials, downloads, and structured syllabi will open in a future release.
listing_detail.unavailable_body: This page is only shown when a listing is approved and public. Teachers can check status in My classroom assets or My listings.
listing_detail.desc_placeholder: Short description will appear here when the teacher adds copy in a later step.

path_strip.aria: Where you are in materials, courses, and listings
path_strip.aria_mine: Your workflow: materials, courses, listings; classroom is entered from materials or courses
path_strip.classroom_from_mine: To teach: go from My materials or My courses, then use Enter classroom on the workbench. Other steps here are prep and sales tracks.
path_strip.step2_lead: Pick materials & course → build classroom assets → list for sale; enter class from an asset or the workbench.

materials_next.title: Suggested next steps
materials_next.intro: After materials are in good shape, most teachers continue in one of these directions.
materials_next.path_a_body: Use files as prep assets, then structure them in My courses for teaching.
materials_next.path_b_title: Path B · Sell a standalone asset
materials_next.path_b_body: If something is ready to sell on its own, open Listings & sales to create a listing and submit it for review.

courses_next.title: After your course is ready
courses_next.intro: A course is teaching content—not a store product by itself. Once it is in good shape, you can teach in the classroom and, in parallel, prepare a public listing.
courses_next.note: Classroom mode is for live teaching; Listings & sales is for public display and selling—they are parallel tracks, not an either/or choice.
courses_next.path_a_body: While the outline and units are still moving, stay on this page to manage the course.
courses_next.path_classroom_title: Path B · Teach in the classroom
courses_next.path_classroom_body: Use your course line in class: open classroom mode and pick Kids or HSK, book/volume, and lesson. The link below uses sample parameters; you can adjust in the hub or here.
courses_next.path_b_body: When you want public listing and selling, go to Listings & sales to create a listing and submit it for review.

listing_source.title: Where listings come from
listing_source.intro: Prepare a course or materials first, then register what you want to sell here.
listing_source.scope: This page manages listings—public display, review, and selling—not the course itself or your private library.
listing_source.source_a_body: When the teaching structure is ready, you usually create the sellable listing here.
listing_source.source_b_body: Handouts, packs, and similar assets can be organized first, then registered here as sellable items.

relation_flow.title: Three layers
relation_flow.title_mine: My workflow: three layers (prep to sale)

workspace.title: Teacher Workspace
workspace.subtitle: Classroom, materials, courses, and listings—common actions in one place.
workspace.layer_materials: Materials: your private slides, handouts, and lesson assets for prep and class—not the same as listed products.
workspace.layer_courses: Courses: the teaching content you structure—drafts, in progress, or ready to teach—can later feed listings.
workspace.layer_listing: Listing management: sellable items with review and status. To sell, manage listings here and pass review.

overview.title: Demo prep progress
overview.disclosure: Lightweight totals from local demo data to show where things are in the prep journey—not real business analytics.

workspace.classroom_flow_note: Flow: materials → courses → teach in the classroom; for selling and public display, also use Listings & sales. “Enter classroom” below is the teaching execution step.
workspace.classroom_flow_note_mine: From My materials and My courses, organize what you teach; return here to Enter classroom. Listings is a separate track for public sale.
workspace.mine_subtitle: Signed in as {name}. This overview counts items linked to your teacher profile in local preview data.
workspace.gated_lead: Your teacher account is not fully cleared yet. Once approved, the full workbench will unlock.
workspace.mine_entry_subtitle: The teaching workbench, materials, and courses open after you are assigned the teacher role and pass profile review.

overview_mine.title: At a glance (this teacher)
overview_mine.disclosure: Counts are filtered to the signed-in teacher’s profile from local data—not global demos or real analytics.

workspace.hub_summary_disclosure: Local demo counts linked to this teacher profile.
workspace.hub_wf_decks_sub: Create a deck in Classroom assets, or open an existing deck to edit.
workspace.hub_wf_class_sub: Pick course, level, and lesson—then enter the teacher courseware view.
workspace.hub_wf_class_pick: Pick an asset in the list to enter class
workspace.hub_wf_publish_sub: Manage publishing items, submit review, and track status.
workspace.hub_wf_commerce_sub: Orders and sales placeholders are on the publishing & sales page.
workspace.hub_listings_empty: No publish items yet. Create one from a deck.
workspace.hub_classroom_assets_hint: Shortcuts here. Full management is on the classroom assets page.

recommended.line_no_deck: You don’t have a deck to publish yet. Create your first teacher deck.
recommended.line_no_listing: You have a deck but no publish item. Generate a publish item in the editor.
recommended.line_submit: The publish item is draft or rejected. Update it, then submit for review.
recommended.line_pending: The publish item is in review. Open publishing to track it.
recommended.line_go_public: Approved. Open preview and set public display.
recommended.line_all_ok: Core flow looks good. Manage decks or add more content.

profile.credential_hint: No real file upload in this build—add metadata to reserve structure for a future uploader.
profile.submit_ok: Submitted. Your profile is now in review.
profile.apply_first: Apply to become a teacher on the workbench first.
profile.pending_readonly: Your profile is in review. Editing is disabled for now.
profile.warn_no_credential: Tip: you have no credential placeholders—submission still works; consider adding them for review.

error.missing_bio_or_intro: Please fill in the bio or the “about you” section (at least one).
error.missing_scope: Choose at least one teaching audience or add expertise tags.

gate.guest_title: Sign in to use the workbench
gate.guest_body: Manage materials, courses, assets, and listings. Create an account or log in to continue.
gate.logged_in_not_teacher_title: You are not a teacher yet
gate.logged_in_not_teacher_body: Apply here to create a profile. After it is approved, the full workbench opens.
gate.not_teacher_title: You are not a teacher yet
gate.not_teacher_body: The teacher module is for people who run classes and manage materials on Lumina. When applications open, you can submit a profile for review from here.
gate.not_teacher_scope: Typical use: private prep assets, course structure, and future listings. Nothing here affects learners until you publish.
gate.apply_note: Guest mode cannot apply. Please log in first.
gate.apply_note_v2: We will create your teacher profile and take you to the profile form.
gate.apply_failed: Could not create a teacher profile. Please try again.
gate.pending_teacher_apply: Your teacher application is under review. Some features will stay limited until it is approved.
gate.draft_path_hint: Open “Teacher profile”, complete the form, and submit for review.
gate.pending_ability: After approval you’ll unlock the full workbench, materials, courses, and more.
gate.rejected_explain: Update your profile and submit again when you are ready.
gate.workbench_limited: The full workbench, materials library, and course manager stay limited until your profile is approved. You can still read the workflow hints below.
gate.body_no_profile: You have the teacher role, but a seller profile is not on file. Create a minimal profile to continue—this is a placeholder in this build.
gate.next_no_profile: Use a future “Create profile” action (Step 2) to submit basic info. Until then, workbench data cannot attach to you.
gate.body_draft: Your profile is saved as a draft. Complete the required info before you can submit for review.
gate.next_draft: Fill in the remaining fields, then submit for review (placeholder).
gate.body_pending_review: We are reviewing your teacher profile. This usually comes before listing or payout features.
gate.next_pending_review: Wait for a decision. The workbench will unlock after approval—no need to resubmit from here in this build.
gate.body_rejected: The last review did not pass. Update your materials and try again when resubmit is available.
gate.next_rejected: Read the reason below, fix the issues, then resubmit (placeholder).
gate.body_suspended: Your teacher access is suspended. New listings and classroom tools are blocked until the issue is resolved with support.
gate.next_suspended: Contact support to understand next steps. This build only shows the state.
gate.migration_dev_hint: [Dev/test] An unclaimed approved demo teacher profile exists in this browser. You can bind tp_demo_seller_001 and its linked classroom assets to the signed-in account. Not a production feature.
gate.migration_dev_done: Demo teacher profile and asset ownership were reassigned.
gate.migration_dev_failed: Could not take over (already claimed or demo row missing).
gate.takeover_demo_sub: Bind this account to the existing on-device teacher row (dev/test only).
gate.dev_force_hint: [Dev/test] If you already have a profile but the merged status blocks the full workbench, force-approve it here (local only).
gate.dev_force_approve_done: Profile is now approved. Check the workbench.
gate.dev_force_approve_failed: Could not force-approve. Make sure a teacher profile exists for this user.

access.not_teacher_body: Switch to a teacher account to manage materials and courses. This page is not available in guest mode here.
access.need_approved_body: These rows open after your teacher profile is approved. You can still return to the workbench to check status.
access.need_approved_courses: The course list opens after your teacher profile is approved.
access.library_locked_title: Library locked for your current status
access.library_locked_body: We hide sample rows so non-approved states are not mixed with a teacher’s own library. After approval, your materials will show here (with uploads in a later release).
access.courses_locked_title: Course list locked for your current status
access.courses_locked_body: We hide sample rows for the same reason as materials. After approval, your courses will list here.

materials.title: My materials
materials.desc: Manage prep assets and see what is already used in courses or ready to move toward listing.
materials.desc_mine: Your prep library for this profile—rows below are only for this signed-in teacher in local data.

courses.title: My courses
courses.desc: Shape your teaching structure and see whether materials are attached or you are ready for listing.
courses.desc_mine: Your teaching structure for this profile. Filtered to the current teacher; empty means nothing linked yet in preview data.

assets.title: My classroom assets
assets.desc: Slide drafts and notes bound to a lesson; open the classroom from an asset when you teach.
assets.desc_mine: Local drafts for this teacher only; not a store product yet.

listing.title: Listings & sales management
listing.desc: Manage public display and review status; see which content has entered the listing stage.
listing.desc_mine: Listings and review still use the Stage 0 screen; this is not live checkout.

assets.page_subtitle: Signed in as {name}. Stored locally in this browser.
assets.gated: Classroom assets open after your teacher profile is approved.
assets.panel_hint: Create a lesson-bound slide draft, then open the classroom from the list or a link. Step 3 will add a real PPT path.
assets.quick_create_note: Default: Kids, book 1, lesson 1. You can build more from each course row.
assets.pub_quick_pending_only: In review — cannot go public yet
assets.pub_quick_submit_review: Open editor to submit for review
assets.pub_quick_open_editor: Open editor to finish and submit
assets.recent_empty: No assets yet—use the button above or create from My courses.
assets.upload_own_draft_sub: Pick a file from this device; it is recorded in My teaching assets only (no content parsing yet).
assets.import_ok_toast: Imported draft added. You can find it in the list.
assets.enter_classroom_blocked_upload_title: Imported drafts are not classroom-ready until a future version can convert them.
assets.edit_placeholder: Editor comes in a later step
assets.empty_title: No classroom assets for this account yet
assets.empty_title_v2: You don’t have any teaching assets yet
assets.empty_body: Create from the workbench or a course. This list follows your bound teacher profile; after taking over local demo data, refresh to see linked assets.
assets.commerce_save_failed: Could not save. Check values and try again.
assets.empty_body_v2: No classroom deck yet. Create one below or from My courses. Data stays in this browser.
assets.empty_body_v3: Create a new deck draft, or generate one from a lesson in My courses. Data stays in this browser.
assets.empty_cta_create: Create your first deck from a lesson
assets.empty_cta_from_course: Generate a deck draft from a course
assets.empty_trash_confirm_2: All drafts in trash will be permanently deleted and cannot be recovered. Continue?
assets.trash_empty_body: Deleted deck drafts appear here. Items older than 30 days are removed automatically.
assets.trash_confirm_not_immediate: This does not permanently delete immediately.
assets.trash_confirm_move: The draft will be moved to trash.
assets.trash_confirm_keep_days: It stays in trash for {days} days.
assets.trash_confirm_after_permanent: After that it is permanently deleted and cannot be recovered.

trash_error.already_trashed: This draft is already in trash.
trash_error.archived: Archived decks cannot be moved to trash in this step.
trash_error.not_trashed: This draft is not in trash.

asset_editor.lead: Edit this on-device deck draft, then use Enter classroom to teach.
asset_editor.section_basics_hint: Title, description, and cover hint appear in the list and the classroom bar.
asset_editor.section_teacher_note_hint: For your own reference while teaching—kept separate from the deck description.
asset_editor.section_outline_hint: Turn sections on or off for this run (not a drag editor yet).
asset_editor.section_outline_classroom: Enabled sections appear in the classroom in this order; disabled ones are hidden.
asset_editor.section_outline_notes_classroom: If you enable the teacher-notes row and add text, a teaching tips area appears in class.
asset_editor.title: Deck title
asset_editor.subtitle: Subtitle
asset_editor.trashed_gate_body: You cannot edit a deleted draft here. Restore it from trash, or wait until it is permanently removed.
asset_editor.publishing_lead: Link this deck to a catalog listing, submit for review, then go public when approved.
asset_editor.vis_hint_no_listing: No listing yet. Create a listing below, then submit for review before going public.
asset_editor.vis_hint_not_approved: Not public yet: the listing must be approved first.
asset_editor.vis_hint_can_public: Ready to go public: approved. You can set visibility to public.
asset_editor.vis_hint_is_public: Public: visitors with the link can view per later commerce rules.
asset_editor.forbidden_edit: You may not edit this deck.
asset_editor.gated: An approved teacher profile is required to edit.
asset_editor.not_lesson_draft: This asset is not a classroom deck draft.
asset_editor.missing_id: Missing deck id in the link.
asset_editor.import_readonly_lead: This version only stores file metadata; content is not parsed.
asset_editor.import_no_parse_yet: Parsing and deep editing are not supported in this version.
asset_editor.import_future_note: Later versions will support richer imports and conversion into teachable classroom decks.

demo.disclosure: Rows below are local demo data to illustrate how materials, courses, and listings relate—not real student or order data.
demo.disclosure_mine: Rows below (when unlocked) are tied to the signed-in teacher in local data—not a global catalog.
demo.disclosure_mine_courses: Course rows, when shown, belong to the current teacher in local data.

material.not_in_courses: Not linked to a course yet

phase.in_course_can_list: In a course · ready to list

source_stage.unset: Source not labeled; see the status column for the listing stage.
source_stage.fallback: Source and stage vary by row; see the status column.

course.draft: From a course · listing draft not submitted

materials_page.title: My materials
materials_page.subtitle: Manage materials you have already created—this page is for listing and categories; use Create materials to author new items.
materials_page.tagline: Review, categorize, and manage items already in your library; new authoring lives under Create materials.
materials_page.manage_scope_note: This page is for management—status, material category, and listing prep—not for the authoring workspace.
materials_page.list_demo_note: Sample rows show demo relationships; uploads will arrive in a future release.
materials_page.empty_cell_title: You don’t have private materials yet
materials_page.empty_cell_intro: Later you’ll upload and manage items such as:
materials_page.empty_cell_item_3: Items stay personal teaching assets by default and are not auto-listed for sale
materials_page.upload_note: Upload and file management will open in a future release.
materials_page.empty_subhint: When upload opens, rows will appear below.
materials_page.classroom_note: Materials support prep and feed into courses and the classroom; organizing files is not the end—teaching happens in your course structure and in class.
materials_page.classroom_note_mine: From My materials, your files feed My courses, then the workbench to enter the classroom. Upload itself is in a later release—button below is intentionally disabled for now with a next-stage note.
materials_page.upload_next_stage: Next release: file upload and PPT import. This button is disabled on purpose; not a bug.
materials_page.mine_page_subtitle: Rows below are materials already created for this teacher profile (demo data with category labels).
materials_page.list_mine_note: Material category labels distinguish demo types; filters and a full taxonomy will follow.
materials_page.link_to_create: Need to create new materials? Open the authoring workspace
materials_page.relation_note_mine: Materials in this list belong to the signed-in teacher only when approved.
materials_page.empty_mine_title: No materials in your library yet
materials_page.empty_mine_body: Add prep assets, then connect them in My courses, then teach from the workbench. Upload and PPT features come in a later step.

courses_page.title: My courses
courses_page.subtitle: Manage the course content you create and organize.
courses_page.tagline: Your own teaching structures—drafts or class-ready—not the same as a sellable listing.
courses_page.list_demo_note: Sample rows show materials and listing hints; editing will arrive in a future release.
courses_page.empty_cell_title: You don’t have your own courses yet
courses_page.empty_cell_item_1: Course drafts and outlines in progress
courses_page.empty_cell_item_2: Teaching structures ready for the classroom
courses_page.empty_cell_item_3: Courses don’t auto-become products; selling uses Listings & sales and review
courses_page.new_note: Course creation and editing will open in a future release.
courses_page.new_next_stage: Next release: new course and classroom asset flow. The button is disabled on purpose; not a bug.
courses_page.mine_page_subtitle: Only courses linked to this teacher profile in local data appear here.
courses_page.list_mine_note: An empty list means you have not created courses in preview for this account yet. Next: prepare classroom assets, bind materials, then teach.
courses_page.relation_note_mine: Courses for this list belong to the current teacher; empty is expected before you add content (Step 2+).
courses_page.empty_mine_title: No courses yet for this account
courses_page.empty_mine_intro: When you have no course rows, start from teaching assets:
courses_page.empty_mine_item_1: Prepare materials, then group them in a course
courses_page.empty_mine_item_2: Link classroom assets (coming later) for projection
courses_page.empty_mine_item_3: Optional: when ready, move to Listings (Stage 0) for a sellable item
courses_page.create_slides_draft: Create slide draft from this course
courses_page.empty_subhint: When creation opens, courses will appear below.

enter.classroom_section_lead: Pick course, level, and lesson—open projection and lesson tools.
enter.classroom_desc: Pick a course, level, and lesson to open classroom mode and lesson tools.
enter.classroom_workflow_note: After materials and courses are ready, enter here to teach. Listing management runs in parallel—classroom for teaching, listings for selling.
enter.classroom_workflow_note_mine: Use My materials / My courses to prepare, then come back here to enter the classroom. Listing is a separate track for selling.

classroom.teacher_note_teaser: This deck has teacher notes—future versions may add a dedicated notes page.

context.asset_params_hint: Loaded from your asset: “{course}” · book {level} · lesson {lesson}
context.no_url_params: No course parameters in the URL—defaults will be used. For consistency with your prep flow, pick course, level, and lesson from the Teacher Workspace first.

classroom.asset_not_found: That classroom asset was not found. We loaded a default classroom instead. Check My classroom assets on the workbench.
classroom.asset_forbidden: This asset is not available for your current account. We loaded a default classroom instead.

presentation.keyboard_shortcuts: ← or PageUp / → or PageDown: change step · F: full screen · Esc: exit full screen or standard view

classroom.cw_scene_fallback: Ties to the course scene/slide area (demo).
classroom.cw_no_lesson_block: This part may have no content in the course JSON yet; the deck still runs without error.
classroom.notes_aria: Teacher tips and private teaching notes (shown as a deck block)
classroom.toolbar_index_hint: Use previous/next or the deck outline to jump between sections.
classroom.notes_for_reference: For the teacher’s reference while teaching. Pair with your public/slide plan.

my.materials_desc: Private handouts, slides, and lesson plans—not public storefront items by default.

ai.desc: Design practice and dialogues with AI. (Coming soon)
ai.scope_note: In-class helper—not for managing materials, courses, or listings.

console.title: Classroom console
console.desc: Lesson flow, attendance, polls, and more. (Coming soon)
console.scope_note: Live lesson controls—not for editing materials, courses, or sellable listings.

create_material.title: Create materials
create_material.subtitle: Material authoring workspace
create_material.lead: Start producing new teaching resources here—PDFs, common documents, picture books, handouts, slide decks, and more. The buttons below are placeholders until editors ship.
create_material.types_hint: Buttons are intentionally disabled for now; each will open an editor or wizard later.
create_material.manage_hint: To browse or manage materials you already created, open My materials.
create_material.guest_body: Sign in to use the material authoring workspace.

publishing.page_hint: Package a classroom asset as a listing, submit for review, then (when approved) choose public visibility for the storefront detail page. Payments are not live in this step.
publishing.source_course_unknown: Not linked to a local asset in this browser

error.asset_archived: This asset is archived and cannot be submitted.
error.already_pending: A review is already in progress for this listing.
error.invalid_listing_state: This listing cannot be submitted in its current state.
error.store_unavailable: Data store is not ready. Try again.
error.listing_create_failed: Could not create the listing. Try again.
error.not_approved: Only approved listings can be set to public.
error.teacher_mismatch: This asset does not belong to the current profile.
error.forbidden: You do not have access to this asset.
error.not_classroom_asset: This action only applies to classroom-asset listings.
error.submit_denied: Submit was blocked by platform rules.
error.teacher_not_verified: Your teacher profile is not verified for this action.
error.teacher_id_required: Teacher profile is required on the listing.
error.teacher_profile_missing: Teacher profile not found in the demo store.
error.not_seller_eligible: Seller eligibility does not allow this listing type (use classroom-asset flow).
error.asset_trashed: This deck is in trash. Restore it before continuing.
error.not_public: Already private, or not public yet.

listing_public.cta_purchase_note: Checkout is not connected in this preview.
listing_public.cta_entitlement_note: Entitlement grant is a later step; button is disabled.
listing_public.not_found_desc: The link may be wrong or the item was removed. Check with the teacher or platform.
listing_public.no_access_body: This item is not approved for public view, is still private, or does not exist. Teachers can see status in My classroom assets and the review console.

sales.title: Sales snapshot (demo)
sales.lead: Counts and amounts come from local orders. This is not a tax or payout statement.
sales.pending_settlement: Payouts, tax, and real settlement are not in this step—these numbers are for display only.

my_content.lead: Content you are allowed to open for this account. Free unlocks and simulated purchases appear here.
my_content.empty: This account has no content yet. Try a public teacher listing to add a test item.

my_orders.lead: Order history for this account. Payments are simulated only; no real charges.
my_orders.empty: No orders for this account yet. After a simulated purchase, it will show up here.

commerce.already_owned_hint: You already have access to this content
commerce.simulated_checkout_note: Simulated payment—no real charge in this preview.
commerce.login_to_acquire: Sign in to get or purchase this content.

error.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.
error.not_public: This content is not available as a public listing.
error.already_owned: You already have access. No need to get it again.
error.invalid_price: The price is not set up for purchase yet.
error.invalid_type: That price type is not supported.

games.title: Kids classroom games
games.desc: Shown only after you open a Kids lesson—ready for projection and interaction.

stage0.title: Listings & sales management
stage0.subtitle: Manage your sellable listings, review status, and supporting details in one place.
stage0.stage_note: Stage 0 preview: no live payments, orders, or payouts. Data is stored locally; you can reset demo seed data.
stage0.seed_sync_hint: If listings, source columns, or rows look incomplete (for example after an old browser cache), tap “Reset demo data” to reload the latest demo seed.
stage0.panel_draft_desc: Fill in the basics to create a draft, then submit for review and track status here.
stage0.secondary_fold_hint: Entitlements, profile, review log, orders (collapsed by default)
stage0.identity_desc: Choose the role to preview. Data is local demo and can be reset.
stage0.identity_reviewer_active: This account can review. A Reviewer actions section appears below.
stage0.guide_1: Drafts can be submitted for review; approval simulates a publish-ready state (still a demo).
stage0.guide_2: Rejections and delists should include a reason to mirror a real review flow.
stage0.guide_3: Orders and entitlements are structural placeholders—not real purchases or formal learner access.
stage0.list_section_hint: Rows below are your listings in this demo; prices and statuses are for workflow practice.
stage0.list_empty_hint: Create a draft above, submit it for review, and status updates will appear here.
stage0.access_banner: Quick entitlement check for demo only—not a production learner system.
stage0.profile_note: Seller identity and eligibility placeholder to explain future gating rules.
stage0.entitlement_banner: Entitlements are illustrative; manual grants demonstrate flow only.
stage0.order_banner: Orders are illustrative; payments are not connected and no real checkout occurs.
stage0.order_note: Commission fields are snapshots at purchase; provider fields are reserved for future payment integration.
stage0.draft_source_hint: Demo note: real listings often come from a finished course or sellable materials. New drafts here do not record a real source link yet.
stage0.flow_note: Flow: after you create a draft you can submit it for review; once approved it is closer to going public (still a local demo).
stage0.asset_listings_desc: When you submit a classroom asset, a matching row appears here and in the main listing table. Reviewers can approve or reject in the section below.

review.zone_subtitle: Reviewer or admin only. Human review today; AI assist may come later. Approve, reject, or delist with reasons.
review.panel_desc: Change listing status with reason code and text; transitions must follow the state machine.
review.hidden: The current demo account cannot review. Switch to the reviewer or admin demo account.

form.title: Title
form.more_settings_hint: Seller type, teacher profile ID, currency

err.teacher_id_required: Teacher listings must include a teacher ID.
err.teacher_mismatch: Listing does not match the teacher profile.
err.not_seller_eligible: Seller eligibility and teacher tier are required before submitting for review.

listing_labels.lst_demo_kids_course_001: Sample content C (teacher · from Kids draft)

hanja.title: Hanzi Study
hanja.coming_soon: Coming soon. Hanzi learning content will be added.
hanja.compare_placeholder: Simplified, Traditional, and Korean Hanzi comparison coming soon.
